---
title: "DL & ML Workflow with R"
id: activity-analysis-3
order: 145
summary: "Selected deep learning and machine learning workflow resources in R."
source_url: "https://geomoer.github.io/geoAI/"
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
materials:
  - materialspat-analysis-00
  - materialspat-analysis-2
  - materialspat-analysis-3
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - advanced
  - supplement
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/activity-analysis-3.md"
---

# Workflow in R

There is a complete advanced course dealing with deep learning and AI in R. For this module, use the selected deep learning parts:

- [Setup working environment](https://geomoer.github.io/geoAI//unit01/unit01-04_setup_working_environment.html)
- [Warm-up R spatial](https://geomoer.github.io/geoAI//unit01/unit01-05_warm-up-r-spatial.html)
- [Remote sensing basics](https://geomoer.github.io/geoAI//unit02/unit02-04_rs.html)
- [Deep learning overview](https://geomoer.github.io/geoAI//unit04/unit04-00-00_overview.html)

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
